sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 232 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22 2. For orders on CMA No.372/2019 3. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Mr. Abid Hussain Shahban advocate for respondent It is jointly stated that in identical cases the references have been disposed of with directions including order dated 11.11.2025 passed in ITRA 269 of 2016 and other connected matters. It is jointly stated that for the reasons stated therein this reference may be disposed of on the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
